summary: Tested all 7 bug fixes for Pet Life Operating System. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend code verified for Sign Out button and Site Status page.

issues: Dashboard page causes browser crash when taking screenshots - possible memory issue with large component tree

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 bug fixes verified working. Member Dashboard has memory issues causing browser crashes during Playwright testing, but the Sign Out button code is correctly implemented.

sign_out_button.details: Sign Out button exists at MemberDashboard.jsx lines 844-853 with data-testid='signout-btn', text 'Sign Out', red styling (text-red-500), and LogOut icon. Code verified correct.

merge_tickets.details: POST /api/tickets/merge validates params correctly. Returns 400 for missing params, 404 for non-existent tickets. Frontend mergeTickets function validates at least 2 tickets selected.

dine_seed_all.details: POST /api/admin/dine/seed-all endpoint works. Button exists in DineManager.jsx with data-testid='seed-all-dine-btn'. Requires admin auth.

stay_seed_all.details: POST /api/admin/stay/seed-all endpoint works. Button exists in StayManager.jsx with data-testid='seed-all-stay-btn'. Requires admin auth.

blog_posts_seed.details: POST /api/admin/blog-posts/seed endpoint works. Returns success response.

blog_posts_display.details: GET /api/blog-posts returns blog posts. Sample: 'Pet-Friendly Cafes in Bangalore: A Complete Guide'

site_status_page.details: Site Status tab in Admin works without errors. Check icon properly imported at Admin.jsx line 134. Page displays 'Site Status Report' with feature counts and green checkmark icons.
